---
title: "Chantan's Quarto Website"
author: "Chantan Morin Jr"
---

## WELCOME {style="text-align: center;"}

# EPPS 6356: Data Visualization {style="text-align: center;"}

This website will be used to:

-   turn in my assignments for EPPS 6356
-   familiarize myself with R and Quarto Website building
-   test certain codes and aesthetics
